title: L1 Media
steps: Rinse 3x with DI water (Left Sink, with tubing) by filling app. 1/4 and swirling aggressively.
Rinse 3x with MilliQ water (dispenser, to the right of right sink) byt filling app. 1/4 and swirling aggressively.
Fill bottle with MilliQ to 1L line
Put autoclave tape on top of bottle, label MQ for milliQ water
loosen caps and put milliQ filled bottles into the solid autoclave bucket (not perforated), put bucket in autoclave and autoclave on liquid setting
empty a bottle of autoclaved MilliQ water
Add as much Instant Ocean to bottle as needed for the salinity you are making (40g for 36PSU)
Fill to one liter line with milliQ water
Put autoclave tape on top of bottle and label with the PSU being made
add a magnetic stirrer bar to bottle - shake aggressively to break up clumps. Put bottle on magnetic hot plate - turn on heat and stir until mostly all particulates dissolve
repeat for 4-5 bottles
loosen caps and put ASW filled bottles into the solid autoclave bucket (not perforated), put bucket in autoclave and autoclave on liquid setting
Empty out an autoclaved MilliQ bottle and attach a 0.2µm bottle-top filter (from shelves up and to the right from the sink)
Let ASW cool enough to be handled comfortably
Shake to resuspend any particulates and/or put on magnetic stirrer until particulates are mostly dissolved
Filter Seawater through the 0.2 µm filter using the vacuum pump next to the magnetic stirrer
Empty out an autoclaved MilliQ bottle and attach a 0.2µm bottle-top filter (from shelves up and to the right from the sink).
filter L1 media through 0.2 filter into the clean bottle.
Add L1 media ingredients to the filtered, autoclaved ASW (N, P, Trace metals, vitamins, Silica)
Repeat for 4-5 bottles of Seawater (try to always do several bottles to get the most use out of the filter cups since they are big chunks of single-use plastic).
Label filtered L1 media and store it in the fridge.
Repeat for 4-5 bottles of L1 media (try to always do several bottles to get the most use out of the filter cups since they are big chunks of single-use plastic).
Rinse and autoclave media bottles along the way, this protocol goes through a lot of autoclaved bottles ....
creator: Maggi Mars
